title: Agent Capabilities V3
subtitle: Core systems powering your agent's intelligence
note: All capabilities are always-on for v3 agents.

pipeline.title: 8-Stage Execution Pipeline
pipeline.description: Every message passes through 8 structured stages in 3 phases.
pipeline.setupDesc: Enriches context with agent config, workspace metadata, user history, and auto-injected memories from past sessions.
pipeline.iterationDesc: Repeats until task complete or max iterations reached.
pipeline.finalizeDesc: Persist metadata, emit events for memory consolidation, and clean up the run.

memory.title: 3-Tier Memory System
memory.description: Progressive memory from conversation to long-term knowledge.
memory.l0Desc: Session history with token-based auto-compaction. When history exceeds the context window threshold, older messages are summarized via LLM and truncated. Memory flush extracts key facts into persistent files before compaction.
memory.l1Desc: Session summaries created after each conversation run. Each gets an L0 abstract (~50 tokens) for fast injection. Hybrid FTS + vector search with 90-day TTL. Relevant abstracts are auto-injected into the system prompt every turn.
memory.l2Desc: Knowledge graph with entities and relations extracted via LLM (confidence threshold 0.75). Auto-dedup merges similar entities. Dreaming consolidates 5+ episodic entries into long-term fact documents searchable via memory tools.
memory.eventFlow: Event-driven: session.completed triggers L1 creation, which triggers L2 extraction and dreaming.

knowledge.kgDesc: Entities (people, projects, technologies) and their relations are extracted from session summaries via LLM. Temporal versioning tracks when facts were valid. Searchable via the knowledge_graph_search tool with multi-hop traversal up to 5 levels deep.
knowledge.vaultDesc: Document registry with [[wikilink]] resolution. Unified search blends vault documents (40%), episodic memories (30%), and KG entities (30%) into a single ranked result set. SHA-256 hashing detects content changes for incremental indexing.
knowledge.dreamingDesc: When 5+ session summaries accumulate, LLM synthesizes long-term facts: user preferences, project architecture, recurring patterns, and key decisions with rationale. Stored as searchable memory documents. Debounced at 10-minute intervals per agent.

orchestration.delegateDesc: Agents delegate tasks to linked agents via agent_links with permission checking. Sync mode blocks up to a configurable timeout waiting for results. Async mode fires immediately and announces results back via message bus when complete.
orchestration.evolutionDesc: Tracks tool usage and retrieval metrics on a weekly cycle. Detects three patterns: low retrieval usage (< 20%), high tool failure rates (< 10% success), and repeated tool patterns (> 100 calls/week). Suggests configuration adjustments with guardrail-protected auto-apply and rollback.
